extension.name: Content - Responsive Tables
extension.author: web-eau.net
extension.license: GNU General Public License version 2 or later
extension.description:
Responsive Tables

Thank you for downloading and using this extension!
Responsive Tables is a "new generation" plugin dedicated for Joomla versions 3.0 and above.

With this plugin, you will be able to make responsive any HTML table in your website. This plugin offer you a great implementation:

  • Doesn't break responsive layouts,
  • Doesn't unnecessarily hide data,
  • Still lets you compare rows.

After installation, don't forget to publish the plugin.
On any data table in your markup, you simply need to attach the CSS class responsive rt like that: < table class="responsive rt" > and that's all !
This plugin was successfuly tested on Apple iPhone, iPad, on Android and also on BlackBerry OS.

You like this extension ? Thanks in advance for posting your positive review on Joomla Extension Directory.

Responsive Tables is release under GNU/GPL v2 license.
